title: monarda russeliana
intro: Monarda russeliana, also known as beebalm or red bergamot mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to North America. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its effectiveness in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Monarda russeliana include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and calming respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes, as well as used in cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
